headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.gstatic.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.googleapis.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleapis.com https://firebasestorage.googleapis.com https://api.open-meteo.com; frame-src 'self' https://*.firebaseapp.com;
